must_do.full_text:
A company gave every employee unlimited access to Claude.

Set zero spending limits.

Got a $500 million bill. In one month.

Meanwhile Meta made token usage a leaderboard.

Low score meant getting fired.

So engineers left AI agents running all day doing nothing.

Just to keep https://t.co/xN0ipC9KeM

angles: 5亿美元账单背后：企业AI激励机制的两大陷阱

must_do.full_text:
New in Claude Code (research preview): dynamic workflows.

Claude writes an orchestration script on the fly, then spins up a large fleet of coordinated subagents in parallel to take on your most complex tasks.

Use the word "workflow" in a prompt to get started. https://t.co/re4SG3AyDm
